---
title: "My first website"
author: "Lucrezia"
affiliation: "Unversity of Trieste"
format: 
  html:
     code-tools: 
     source: true
     toggle: false
     caption: Show the code for this document
    toc: TRUE
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: TRUE
    grid:   
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme: 
      light: journal
      dark: superhero
self-contained: true
lang: it
bibliography: biblio.bib
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin 
    
---
#presentation

This is Lucrezia's website! [@ggplot]!

And this is a squirrel 
![a turtle](img/tartaruga.jpg)

@fig-tarta presents a turtle

## Sub presentation

sub section $X = V + E$

### Sub sub section 

another sub sub section

::: {.column-margin}

$$X = V+E$$  {#eq-ctt}


:::

#### Paragraph

this is the paragraph 

::: {.grid}


::: {.g-col-4}
This is my first column
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
This is my second column
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
This is my third column

For further details look at the [code chunks](code chunks.html) file. 
:::

:::
